# Wave 8 — Customer Data Boundary
<!-- Auto-generated by Wave 8 Gate Commander — 2026-05-07 -->

> **Policy:** Customer PII never committed to git. All live data in gitignored paths. Zero fake data in production.

## Data Classification

| Data Class | Examples | Storage | Git Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Customer PII | Name, phone, email, CR number | `data/customers/<handle>/` | GITIGNORED |
| Portal tokens | Per-customer access tokens | `data/customers/<handle>/customer_portal_token.txt` | GITIGNORED |
| Integration plans | Integration_plan.md per customer | `data/customers/<handle>/integration_plan.md` | GITIGNORED |
| Railway env vars | Customer-specific credentials | `data/customers/<handle>/env_vars_railway.txt` | GITIGNORED |
| Feature requests | Customer feature asks | `data/customers/<handle>/feature_requests.jsonl` | GITIGNORED |
| Proof events | Real proof of work (JSONL) | `docs/proof-events/*.jsonl` | GITIGNORED |
| DPA copies | Signed agreements | Outside repo (Google Drive / physical) | NEVER COMMITTED |
| LLM traces | Langfuse / OTel spans | External service or local only | GITIGNORED |

## .gitignore Patterns Required

```
data/customers/**
docs/wave6/live/**
docs/proof-events/*.jsonl
docs/proof-events/*-units.jsonl
docs/phase-e/live/**
docs/diagnostics/**
docs/designops/exports/**
.env
*.env.local
customer_portal_token.txt
env_vars_railway.txt
feature_requests.jsonl
```

## Boundary Enforcement Rules

1. **NO customer PII in git** — `data/customers/**` is gitignored
2. **NO portal tokens in git** — tokens written only to gitignored paths
3. **NO proof events in git** — runtime JSONL files are gitignored
4. **NO mock/fake customer data** — `seed_demo_data.py` uses fictional companies only
5. **NO secrets in code** — only `.env` references, never hardcoded values
6. **DPA must be signed** — onboarding wizard refuses to run without DPA confirmation

## Verification

Run: `bash scripts/wave8_customer_data_boundary_check.sh`

Expected output: All boundary rules PASS.

## Arabic Note / ملاحظة عربية

جميع بيانات العملاء محمية بموجب الـ PDPL السعودي. لا تُخزَّن بيانات العميل في git. الـ DPA موقّعة قبل أي معالجة للبيانات.
